name: 微分方程（HL）
subject: math
curriculum_points: Formulate and solve first order differential equations using separation of variables and the integrating factor method (AO3).
Model real-world phenomena, such as Newton's Law of Cooling or simple population models, using first order differential equations and interpret the solutions.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「微分方程（HL）」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：Formulate and solve first order differential equations using separation of variables and the integrating factor method (…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：Model real-world phenomena, such as Newton's Law of Cooling or simple population… 对理解「微分方程（HL）」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
